content.full_text:
March 4, 2002

Philip B. Avila
Attorney at Law
920 Fifteenth Street
Modesto, CA 95354

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-247

Dear Mr. Avila:

This correspondence confirms our telephone conversation that your request for written advice of October 9, 2001, under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ has been withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature]
By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Staff Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
